mapper.sql: id , agent_id, title, parent_session_id, session_type, metadata, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_session (agent_id, title, parent_session_id, session_type, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid), #{title}, CAST(#{parentSessionId} AS uuid),
#{sessionType} DEFAULT
, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, title, parent_session_id, session_type, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND session_type = 'PARENT'
SELECT id, agent_id, title, parent_session_id, session_type, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE session_type = 'PARENT' ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT id, agent_id, title, parent_session_id, session_type, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND session_type = 'PARENT' ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT id, agent_id, title, parent_session_id, session_type, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_session WHERE parent_session_id = CAST(#{parentSessionId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_session WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_session
agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid),
title = #{title},
metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb),
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
